findings.title: audit hash-chain sha256 deferred to M1 — stakeholder waiver logged, tracked tech-debt
findings.detail: packages/audit hash-chain uses djb2 stub in Sprint-0. No production audit writes occur before M1. Structural protections (DDL, WORM GRANT, S3 Object-Lock COMPLIANCE/7yr) in place. sha256 swap gated to M1 before first production audit write. Stakeholder approved 2026-06-15 with M1 follow-ups acknowledged.
findings.due: M1 — before first production audit write

summary: GO. 0 CRITICAL/HIGH. Audit-sha256 M1 deferral carries a Stakeholder-logged waiver (tracked tech-debt). All other residual items (R-1, R-3 through R-8) are scaffold-by-design, sanctioned by scope rulings, and correctly gated to dependent M1 capabilities.
